# Open Thread 432

**From:** Astral Codex Ten <astralcodexten@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-05-04T12:54:07.000Z

---

View this post on the web at https://www.astralcodexten.com/p/open-thread-432

This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/10fa5f1b-b6de-44eb-8a48-c45e7b41b3fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/5f56aa09-7727-4a1b-9e14-857b086c5ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/43e43e46-2f04-4171-a80f-0be78d8bdb54?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/353ce833-ef68-40d8-9d48-234d225367c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Most content is free, some is subscriber only; you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/94ad3444-bfd7-4890-903d-257cb4ca4daa?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Also:
1: Reminder that the due date for this year’s book review contest is May 20th. Contest rules here [ https://substack.com/redirect/b96a1c37-badf-49a3-b680-89501129f3b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], submission form here [ https://substack.com/redirect/75631c2f-5626-4680-9804-64e878785296?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ].
2: The day after I posted Your Attempt To Solve Debate Will Not Work [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4ca2bf0-d522-478c-88a3-1bbe5d0b2af2?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], @RatOrthodox announced the launch of the debate-solving attempt he’d been working on. I swear I didn’t know about this or intend to sabotage him. As compensation, I link it here: refutree.com [ https://substack.com/redirect/89b82a4c-bdbe-4ac8-88cc-0e9db29c69a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. I can’t review whether it’s good or not, because I didn’t try it, because it won’t work.
3: Several new bans, including Shankar [ https://substack.com/redirect/ac63c2da-3898-4139-acf5-82ef2186ce28?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], GrimMoar [ https://substack.com/redirect/b2914741-a4fa-4a6e-8349-72e20dc90930?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], Nicholas Lopez [ https://substack.com/redirect/a83e30a6-9b10-43af-8309-3944c15028ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], Andy G [ https://substack.com/redirect/ba37a522-da95-43ec-8cb6-7793aec11dce?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Sometimes Substack blocks people from seeing banned comments, so if you can’t read those it’s not your fault.

Unsubscribe https://substack..22b0yFGN6UFHBsvgQkigX_IZgdlapsqJ8yDgq2ik1MA?

---
